items.title: [负面] As a big Slay The Spire fan, this immediately caug...
items.summary:
As a big Slay The Spire fan, this immediately caught my attention, but sadly I don't think I can bring myself to play more than the first tutorial dungeon.

The Pros:
+ Artwork and overall aesthetic is stunning
+ Beautiful animations in both cutscenes and gameplay
+ Great music
+ *Some* cool character designs
+ Interesting premise
+ The combat system itself is very enjoyable. If you like Slay The Spire, you'll feel right at home here.

The Cons:
- This is a gacha game, and one that takes a lot of pages out of Genshin Impact's book in terms of character building, which, at least for me, is an immediate turn-off. I've spent too much time grinding materials to ever want to go through that again.
- All text translations utilize generative AI. The English translation is the most complete out of our current options, but it still utilizes machine translation at its foundation. If this game ever reaches a point where the studio hires real translators to localize this work from the bottom up **without** AI, that would be incredible. As it stands now, I cannot support this game or recommend it to others as this is something I am morally against as a translator myself.
- Noun-itis abound. Lots of made-up terms are thrown at you quite quickly and make things hard to follow or understand.
- This could be due to AI translations, or because I only played the intro, but the dialogue felt quite bland and did not do much to make individual characters stand out.
- Sexualized female characters. Depending on your preferences, this could be a bonus for you, and by many gacha game's standards the level on fanservice in the designs is relatively tame, but if you're like me and rather fatigued by character designs that prioritize "profitability" and sexiness over more interesting designs, you'll be a tad disappointed here.

There is a lot of potential here, and I wish I liked it more, but the unit building and usage of ChatGPT for translations make this a hard pass.

items.title:
[正面] 跟沙耶之歌連動！？
還有主題曲 跟 廣播劇
[strike]這不就是逼我玩嗎[/strike]

花...
items.summary:
跟沙耶之歌連動！？
還有主題曲 跟 廣播劇
[strike]這不就是逼我玩嗎[/strike]

花了三天把忘卻篇七章 + 沙耶之歌連動劇情打完

有點意思的卡牌，但數值有點迷

（沙耶+珊+法洛思）
前四章簡單到不行
湊狂氣湊狂氣>沙耶放侵蝕>珊開大 看boss瞬間蒸發

第五章放棄治療的難......boss那傷害到底是怎樣

第六章有好一點
BOSS轉階段是不是都會鎖血了

第七章不研究一下 [b]局外[/b] 成長根本連boss房都到不了
七章玩到一半就覺得原本陣容實在不行了又去抽 泰旖絲 [b]大[/b]女王才繼續
因為是新抽到的當然等級就要重練Orz
（題外話第七章要賣瑟的話 拜託也多畫幾張 CG 吧 怎麼會就那張圖反覆用
Ver.1.4「無数の子孫の母」那 PV 裡面不都已經出現了嗎）

真心建議在主線關卡再增加一個『簡單』難度
只要有抽到角色放進隊伍時就自動拉到適合的等級
方便玩家直接試不同陣容看有沒有希望贏

我只想拿不同構築打牌看劇情，根本不想農素材啊！
[hr][/hr]

劇情方面有點一言難盡
各種既視感的克蘇魯元素、情節
配上一點都不克蘇魯的收尾
[strike]說到底銀芯這種超方便吐便當的設定就絕望不起來[/strike]
本質還是天選之人挑戰強敵、戰勝強敵的情節

往好的說是編劇 SAN值還很充足，想不出啥精神錯亂的故事
往壞的說就是俗
[strike]不過持續運營的手遊好像也沒啥發揮空間就是[/strike]
[hr][/hr]

補個UID：[b]101931454[/b]
話說可以看別人的戰鬥回放這功能立意挺不錯
但那個播放器功能是不是太少了點啊
怎麼會只有暫停跟二倍數兩個按鈕
至少該有播單張卡的功能吧
戰鬥的詳細Log也沒，常常搞不清楚傷害到底是怎麼算的
有這功能拜託參考一下博德之門那種 TRPG 怎麼顯示傷害計算

items.title: [正面] i love the vibe of this game. horror and another s...
items.summary:
i love the vibe of this game. horror and another slay the spire-like gacha that somehow, i never heard of and was released before chaos zero nightmare 😮.

the good thing about this game is that it hasnt been infiltrated by korean incels who want to self insert wherever possible and detest having characters with their own personalities and love interests, or maybe i just havent heard enough about the game nor have i gone far enough to notice it yet

i love the horror aspect but i dont like the fact that whenever something horrifying is being described, there is no visuals to go with it 😭. this is a visual novel-esque gacha, give us some type of visual. like the scene with the guy banging his head on the wall, unfazed, bleeding, suddenly turning towards us, and charging at us. i dont care if its just drawn looking like a shadow, give me some type of visual 😭

idk why but i just really like horror gachas or maybe its just the horror visual novels? czn had a good start but alas, internal turmoil and korean incels invading the game causing it to have a less than satisfactory story and direction. i really wouldve loved the original idea of czn, but we got some mid story from some director who thought itd be cool to take over the project and basically force out the original storywriter, but i digress. so far, 6 hours in, i definitely think this is a really interesting premise and story so far. my thoughts may or may not change, but we shall see. 8/10 for me for now

items.title: [正面] Beautiful artwork, lovely music, and a very fun tw...
items.summary:
Beautiful artwork, lovely music, and a very fun twist on the card battle system I was expecting from screenshots. I've barely gotten into the story but I can already see why so many people flocked to support this game and save it from an early grave. 

If you like the art, and enjoy gothic, and lovecraftian themes, I highly recommend this game.

items.title: [负面] 就是一个垃圾游戏，忘却此游戏吧。然后设计者麻烦将这个数学题破解一下：纳维-斯托克斯方程存在性与光滑性...
items.summary:
就是一个垃圾游戏，忘却此游戏吧。然后设计者麻烦将这个数学题破解一下：纳维-斯托克斯方程存在性与光滑性（Navier-Stokes Existence and Smoothness）
该问题属于流体力学，要求证明三维不可压缩流体的纳维-斯托克斯方程在所有初始条件下是否存在光滑解，或是否可能出现奇异性。

游戏商，设计者能破解这道数学题，再推荐和更新游戏吧。
